economic_notes: Nation is a member of Saskatoon Tribal Council Inc. and STC Health and Family Services Inc. Has 14% ownership in STC Investments Limited Partnership and STC Casino Holdings Corporation. Subsidiaries: Kinistin Bison Inc. and 102009262 Saskatchewan Ltd. Pursuing agricultural implements claim and timber claim against the Crown.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023. Net debt position of $5,430,587. Two wholly owned subsidiaries consolidated: Kinistin Bison Inc. and 102009262 Saskatchewan Ltd. New accounting standards adopted in FY2023: PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations (resulting in $301,703 ARO liability and $261,000 added to TCA) and PS 3450 Financial Instruments. New contaminated site liability of $210,000 recognized. Non-interest bearing agricultural implements claim loan ($1,060,518) and timber claim loan ($257,122) outstanding. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($10,860,517) + STC Health ($3,059,691) + ISC Health ($883,676) + CMHC ($459,354) + Saskatoon Tribal Council ($576,029) = $15,839,267 approximately; OSR includes First Nations Trust, miscellaneous, Dakota Dunes, rent, STC Casino, livestock sales, pasture rental, livestock inventory adjustment.
